assumption: No feedback controller; controls are replayed open-loop.
likely_impact: Tends to overstate fragility under perturbations.

assumption: Translational dynamics only (no full attitude/actuator dynamics).
likely_impact: Can misestimate controllability and steering losses.

assumption: Aerodynamics and propulsion use reduced lookup/parametric models.
likely_impact: Bias in drag/thrust loss estimates and fuel optimum.

assumption: Atmospheric uncertainty modeled with scalar density multiplier.
Finite collocation grid and finite solver tolerances.
likely_impact: Can introduce discretization/integration bias in objective.

assumption: Stage transitions are idealized without hardware faults.
likely_impact: Underestimates real mission risk and contingency fuel.
